components.role: current operating truth for the MVP OS source repository
canonical source for tagged MVP OS releases
dependency-free conditional preflight and acceptance enforcement
short local-work contracts and full product/integration contracts with legacy compatibility
typed independent classification and product review before schema v2 implementation
non-authoritative connector, schedule, task, tool, file, and gateway runtime guidance
pull-request distribution to registered projects only

invariants: published tag points to the current source release commit
schema v1 task contracts pass only by exact SHA-256 registration in current hash-verified Project Control acceptance
short mode never covers features, integrations, external actions, product experiments, or conditional scopes
schema v2 short mode forbids user-visible, external, public API, data-contract, and dependency changes
schema v2 preflight and final reviews explicitly confirm gate classification
conditional gates do not burden out-of-scope projects
canonical and template skill trees remain byte-identical
external-result claims never exceed observed evidence
